seoTitle: Findon Creek vs Fingal Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Findon Creek and Fingal Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Findon Creek vs Fingal Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Findon Creek and Fingal Bay.
heading: Findon Creek vs Fingal Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Findon Creek, New South Wales and Fingal Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Findon Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Fingal Bay (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Findon Creek or Fingal Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Findon Creek has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Fingal Bay scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Findon Creek scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Fingal Bay scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Findon Creek or Fingal Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Findon Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
